name: Strategic Deployment
descriptionTemplate: After commanding infantry to attack, recover HP equal to X% of the damage dealt. If a friendly armored unit or artillery is within 1 hex, infantry unit’s attack and counterattack range +1.

progression.renderedDesc: After commanding infantry to attack, recover HP equal to 3% of the damage dealt. If a friendly armored unit or artillery is within 1 hex, infantry unit’s attack and counterattack range +1.

After commanding infantry to attack, recover HP equal to 12% of the damage dealt. If a friendly armored unit or artillery is within 1 hex, infantry unit’s attack and counterattack range +1.
After commanding infantry to attack, recover HP equal to 15% of the damage dealt. If a friendly armored unit or artillery is within 1 hex, infantry unit’s attack and counterattack range +1.
